name: Sunflower and Pasta Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all salad ingredients in a large bowl.
2. In a separate jar, whisk together the lemon juice, sunflower oil, garlic powder, and black pepper until blended.
3. Pour the dressing over the pasta mixture and toss lightly to combine.
4. Chill several hours or overnight, stirring occasionally.
5. Sprinkle with additional sunflower seeds before serving.
